texto: [D]umb evolutionary processes have dramatically amplified the intelligence in the human lineage even compared with our close relatives the great apes and our own humanoid ancestors
autor: and there is no reason to suppose Homo sapiens to have reached the apex of cognitive effectiveness attainable in a biological system.
